footer.tagline: Crafting exceptional coffee experiences since 2020. Every cup tells a story.

aboutPage.title: Built around thoughtful coffee and everyday hospitality
aboutPage.description: Morii Coffee brings together carefully sourced beans, warm service, and calm spaces designed to make each visit feel intentional.

highlights.one: Seasonal coffee offerings crafted for both classic tastes and curious drinkers.
highlights.two: Store teams trained to deliver fast, friendly service without losing the human touch.
highlights.three: Menus designed to pair signature drinks with pastries and simple comfort food.
highlights.four: Digital experiences that make discovery, ordering, and store visits feel seamless.

story.title: Our story
story.body: Morii started with a simple goal: create a coffee brand that feels polished without becoming impersonal. From the first store onward, the focus has been on consistent drinks, welcoming environments, and small details that make guests want to return.

craft.title: How we approach craft
craft.body: We treat quality as a chain rather than a single step. Beans, recipes, bar flow, and presentation all matter. That is why our menu balances dependable favorites with rotating specials that keep the experience fresh.

community.title: Why community matters
community.body: Coffee shops work best when they become part of a local rhythm. Morii aims to be a place for quick mornings, casual catch-ups, and repeat rituals, supported by a storefront and digital experience that feel equally considered.

contactPage.title: We are easy to reach when you need help
contactPage.description: Whether you have a product question, order issue, partnership idea, or store feedback, the Morii team is ready to help through the right channel.

highlights.one: Customer support requests are reviewed during daily operating hours.
highlights.two: Store-specific questions can be resolved faster when you include the branch name.
highlights.three: Order follow-ups are easier to track when you share your order number.
highlights.four: Feedback from guests directly informs menu, service, and app improvements.

email.title: Email support
email.body: For general questions or non-urgent follow-up, email hello@moriicoffee.com. Include a short summary of the issue and any helpful context so our team can route your request quickly.

phone.title: Phone assistance
phone.body: If your request is time-sensitive, call our support line at +84 28 3822 4567. This is best for urgent order issues, pickup coordination, or immediate store-related questions.

visit.title: Visit or message a store
visit.body: For local availability, opening hours, or in-store experiences, the fastest route is often the nearest branch. Check the store locator for addresses, hours, and location details before heading out.

termsPage.title: Terms that keep ordering and browsing clear
termsPage.description: These terms outline the basic expectations for using Morii Coffee online services, placing orders, and interacting with your account.

highlights.one: Product availability and pricing may change by store, campaign, or stock level.
highlights.two: Orders can be declined or adjusted when payment, inventory, or fulfillment issues occur.
highlights.three: Accounts should be used with accurate information and reasonable security practices.
highlights.four: Promotions may carry separate conditions or expiration windows.

orders.title: Orders and fulfillment
orders.body: Submitting an order does not guarantee fulfillment until the store confirms inventory and processing. Morii may contact you to clarify substitutions, pickup timing, or delivery details if operational issues arise.

payments.title: Payments and promotions
payments.body: Displayed prices are intended to be accurate, but obvious errors can be corrected before fulfillment. Discounts and campaign offers may be limited by date, usage count, participating stores, or minimum order thresholds.

accounts.title: Accounts and fair use
accounts.body: Users are responsible for maintaining account credentials and providing current contact details. Misuse of promotional mechanics, disruptive behavior, or attempts to interfere with the service may result in restricted access.

privacyPage.title: How Morii handles customer information
privacyPage.description: We collect only the information needed to support ordering, account access, service quality, and a smoother experience across stores and digital channels.

highlights.one: Order and profile details help us deliver purchases, receipts, and account features.
highlights.two: Usage data can be reviewed to improve performance and identify service issues.
highlights.three: Customer information is not shared beyond operational, support, and legal needs.
highlights.four: You can reach out to update, review, or clarify how your information is used.

collection.title: What we collect
collection.body: Depending on how you use Morii, this may include profile details, contact information, order history, saved preferences, and technical signals needed to keep the storefront secure and reliable.

usage.title: How information is used
usage.body: Collected data supports account authentication, order processing, customer care, store operations, analytics, and service improvements. We aim to use information in ways that stay closely tied to the customer experience.

control.title: Your choices
control.body: If you need help updating account details, understanding stored information, or resolving a privacy concern, contact the Morii support team. We review requests in line with operational requirements and applicable legal obligations.
